title: More nuggets: Diamonds and Emeralds
description: Adds more nuggets to the game‍
body:
**More Nuggets: Diamonds & Emeralds**

This mod expands the vanilla smelting and crafting mechanics by adding missing nugget variants for precious materials. It provides a useful way to recycle old gear and manage your resources more efficiently.

**What this mod adds:**

**New resources:**

- Diamond Nuggets

- Emerald Nuggets

**Logical crafting:**

- Combine 9 nuggets to create a full diamond or emerald.

- Breakdown a full diamond or emerald into 9 nuggets.

**Recycling system:**

- Smelt damaged or unwanted diamond tools, weapons, and armor in a furnace or blast furnace to  receive diamond nuggets.

- Smelt emerald-based items or equipment to recover emerald nuggets.

- Expanded support for smelting
